phase_name: post-milestone — field benchmark + impact-chain/endpoints honesty fixes (v1.47.0→v1.50.0)
session_type: field benchmark on fresh OSS Spring repos + tool-improvement backlog (honest-signal fixes), NOT phase execution

completed_tasks.name: CH-005 — framework/external-interface DI blind-spot detection in impact-chain
completed_tasks.detail: v1.47.0. _external_supertypes() reads raw implements/extends from cir.dependencies; on empty blast radius + non-inert external supertype → confidence=low, metadata.blind_spots=['framework_di']+external_supertypes, CH-005 warning. Validated on Broadleaf LocalRedirectStrategy (flagged) + FieldDaoImpl (not flagged). Mirrors CH-003 value-type guard.

completed_tasks.name: Field benchmark on fresh repos (shopizer + halo) + honest report
completed_tasks.detail: Cloned shopizer-fieldtest (Boot 2.5.12, javax, 1210 java, MVC) + halo-fieldtest (Boot 3, WebFlux fn, 1254 java). migrate-check 9/10 decisive on shopizer (555 findings, readiness 0/100, 301 blocking, 107.3 days, OpenRewrite recipes). impact-chain interface/impl proven on fresh repo (CH-001b holds). Report: .planning/benchmark-fieldtest-2026-06-17.md. Found 3 honest gaps F-1/F-2/F-3.

completed_tasks.name: F-3 / CH-006 — hub-interface caller over-expansion fix
completed_tasks.detail: v1.48.0. implements/extends were traversed in caller BFS, attributing sibling implementors of a shared in-repo interface as false direct callers (halo ThumbnailEndpoint 42 phantom = other 42 CustomEndpoint impls; shopizer 45 phantom Mapper callers). Fix: added implements/extends to _SKIP_EDGE_TYPES. Loss-free (CH-001a/b expansion uses ImplementationGraph indices, not these edges). Verified halo 42→0, shopizer ProductService 32 direct preserved.

completed_tasks.name: F-2 — honest WebFlux/functional-routing signal in endpoints
completed_tasks.detail: v1.49.0. extract_java_endpoints modeled annotation routing only; functional DSL (route().GET(...)/RouterFunction/CustomEndpoint) was silently invisible (halo endpoints=0). Now reports functional_routing block {files,route_registrations,modeled:false} + warning; empty-surface case warns against misreading. Deliberately does NOT synthesize partial paths (relative, would mislead). Verified halo 168 regs/51 files; shopizer no false trigger.

completed_tasks.name: F-1 — don't cap impact-chain confidence on informational expansion warnings
completed_tasks.detail: v1.50.0. confidence was medium whenever any warning existed, but CH-001a/b expansion notices are appended on every iface/impl query → never high. Fix: confidence_reducing flag set only by hub-guard truncation; 'or warnings' → 'or confidence_reducing'. Verified shopizer ProductService medium→high. Closes field-benchmark backlog (F-1/F-2/F-3 all fixed).

remaining_tasks.name: Watch Broadleaf PRs #3131 + #3132 review feedback
remaining_tasks.needs: maintainer response; both still OPEN/REVIEW_REQUIRED. From prior session, unrelated to this session's work.

remaining_tasks.name: Reframe deferred security-audit items #4/#6 (custom-annotation security) as enrichment per product strategy
remaining_tasks.needs: decision per project_product_strategy (security-detection deprioritized). Low priority.

human_actions_pending.action: Optionally push master + tags to origin
human_actions_pending.context: origin/master == master (0 ahead per local ref); tags v1.47.0/1.48.0/1.49.0/1.50.0 are local — user has been pushing manually ('ya he pusheado yo'). Verify tags reached origin if release artifacts depend on them.

decisions.decision: CH-005/CH-006/F-2 implemented as HONEST-SIGNAL guards, not full modeling
decisions.rationale: Per feedback_honest_benchmarks: false positives/silent zeros are worse than admitting a gap. CH-005 detects external-DI blindness (under-report), CH-006 kills in-repo hub over-report (false positives), F-2 surfaces functional-routing instead of synthesizing misleading partial paths. Full caller/route recovery = larger separate efforts.

decisions.decision: No upstream PR opened this benchmark round
decisions.rationale: Tool was decisive on DIAGNOSIS (migrate-check/blast-radius) but the motivating issues were either full-migration scope (too large for one verifiable PR) or cases the tool did NOT help find (halo #9898 functional-endpoint blindness) — claiming credit would be trap promo. Next-round PR candidate: shopizer single-module javax→jakarta slice driven by migrate-check, verified by compile (deferred — no mvn/gradle runnable in env).

decisions.decision: Each fix validated against the real repo that exposed it before merge
decisions.rationale: Synthetic unit tests alone missed pipeline-level behavior; ran impact-chain/endpoints on shopizer+halo to confirm fixes fire (and don't false-trigger) end-to-end.

git_state: atlas-cli clean. master HEAD 5f243ec (v1.50.0), 0 ahead of origin/master per local ref. Local tags v1.47.0/1.48.0/1.49.0/1.50.0 (push state of tags unverified). Fieldtest repos at ../shopizer-fieldtest + ../halo-fieldtest (shallow clones, gitignored siblings, NOT part of atlas-cli). .planning gitignored except .continue-here.md + HANDOFF.json.
next_action: Either (a) start a new field-benchmark round to find the next honest gap (clone a different fresh Spring repo; stress migrate-check + blast-radius; honest scoring), (b) pursue the deferred shopizer migrate-check-driven PR once a build is runnable, or (c) task 7 security-audit reframe. No active blockers.
context_notes: Session 74. Full loop: honest field benchmark (3 real gaps found by stressing fresh repos shopizer+halo, chosen to avoid Broadleaf confirmation bias) → closed all 3 across 4 releases v1.47.0→v1.50.0, each validated on the repo that exposed it, no regression to the strong side. Strong side reconfirmed on unseen repos: migrate-check decisive (shopizer 9/10), impact-chain interface/impl solid. Tool measurably more honest now: fewer false positives (CH-006), fewer silent zeros (CH-005/F-2), confidence signal restored (F-1). Verification of Java behavior done via the tool's own CLI on real clones (no mvn/gradle in env). gh authenticated as HarounDominique. Memories updated: finding_benchmark_di_mediated_blindspot (CH-005), finding_fieldtest_endpoint_hub_gaps (F-1/2/3 all FIXED).
